data.title: LDO price forecast: Aiming for $1.63 breakout, predicting 40% surge to $2.10 by October 2025 despite bearish signals.
data.description: According to forecasts, the potential breakout of the LDO price above the $1.63 resistance level could potentially lead Lido DAO to reach $2.10 in the next 4 to 6 weeks. This positive trajectory is anticipated even with the current bearish signals in the market.

data.title: Chijet Motor Co. Inc. issued 640,850 class A ordinary shares to CVR holders on record as of July 22, 2025.
data.description: Chijet Motor Company, Inc. (NASDAQ: CJET) disclosed today that they have distributed 640,850 class A ordinary shares valued at US$0.003 per share to holders of contingent value rights (CVRs) as of July 22, 2025. These shares were issued to Qualifying CVR Holders on a pro rata basis according to the number of CVRs they possessed. The record date for eligibility to receive the shares was also on July 22, 2025. Chijet Motor Company is a prominent high-tech firm specializing in the production, distribution, and maintenance of both traditional fuel and new energy vehicles.

data.title: Nasdaq proposes new listing standards with enhanced requirements for public float and IPO capital raised, and stricter delisting procedures for non-compliant companies.
data.description: In New York on September 3, 2025, Nasdaq announced revisions to its listing standards to support capital formation, protect investors, and maintain market integrity. The proposed changes include stricter criteria for minimum company public float and capital raised in IPOs. Additionally, Nasdaq suggested more rigorous procedures for suspending and delisting companies that do not meet continued listing standards. These updates aim to strengthen Nasdaq's commitment to fostering a robust marketplace.
Firmenich, in partnership with dsm, to redeem €750M hybrid bond.

data.title: Dow Jones rises, S&P breaks record, Nvidia earnings in focus. Kohl's stock soars. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a surge in anticipation of Nvidia's earnings release, while Kohl's stock witnessed a significant rise. The stock market saw the Dow rallying towards the end of the trading session as the S&P broke a new record. Investors were closely monitoring Nvidia's earnings report.

data.title: Regulators hint at 24/7 capital markets, which could bring new opportunities and risks to traditional markets not open round the clock.
data.description: The implementation of a round-the-clock trading cycle would introduce both advantages and vulnerabilities to conventional financial markets that currently do not operate outside of regular business hours.

data.title: Trump Administration considering declaring national housing emergency, citing affordability concerns. XLRE ETF up 4% YTD. Treasury Secretary Bessent hints at cost-cutting and supply expansion measures.
data.description: The Trump administration is reportedly discussing the possibility of declaring a national housing emergency this fall, a measure not used since the 2008 financial crisis. This decision comes as concerns over affordability continue to rise and Republicans gear up for the 2026 midterms. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent shared during a Labor Day breakfast interview in McLean, Virginia that affordability will be a major focus for the administration moving forward. The XLRE ETF has seen a 4% increase year to date. Bessent mentioned potential steps to reduce costs and increase housing supply as part of the administration's strategy. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Noodles & Company to explore strategic alternatives for shareholder value, including refinancing and sale.
data.description: In Broomfield, Colorado on September 3, 2025, Noodles & Company revealed that they (Nasdaq: NDLS) are conducting a strategic review to enhance shareholder value. The Board of Directors is exploring various options such as refinancing current debts, franchising, selling parts or the entire business, or engaging in other financial transactions to maximize benefits. The company aims to consider all possible strategic alternatives to ensure shareholder value is optimized.

data.title: Trump urges Fed to lower rates to reduce mortgage rates for homebuyers; Powell resists.
data.description: President Trump is urging the Federal Reserve to lower borrowing rates, emphasizing that it would lead to reduced mortgage rates for potential homebuyers.

data.title: U.S. Open winners receive a symbolic envelope, not a check. Each singles champion will earn $5 million.
data.description: The winners of both singles championships will be rewarded with a substantial $5 million each. However, it is important to note that the envelope they are handed during the trophy ceremony holds more symbolic value rather than actual payment.

data.title: Ether ETFs experience second consecutive week of fund outflows as prices dip slightly. #cryptocurrency
data.description: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous 5.2%. Additionally, the number of new job positions created in the last month has reached a record high of 300,000. This positive trend is attributed to various government policies and economic recovery efforts. Experts predict that the job market will continue to improve in the coming months, with more job opportunities becoming available across different sectors. The current administration has expressed optimism about the future economic outlook and aims to sustain this momentum in the labor market.

data.title: AC Immune improves pipeline focus, extends cash runway with operational efficiencies.
data.description: An unprecedented number of wildfires have ravaged large parts of the country, with over 100,000 acres of land already scorched. As a result, more than 500 homes have been destroyed and thousands of residents have been forced to evacuate. Firefighters have been working tirelessly to contain the blazes, but strong winds and dry conditions continue to fuel the flames. The government has allocated $5 million for emergency relief efforts, and local authorities have issued a state of emergency in the affected regions. Citizens are urged to stay vigilant and follow evacuation orders to ensure their safety.

data.title: Salesforce beats Q2 earnings but shares fall due to weak sales outlook; guidance for October quarter falls below expectations.
data.description: Salesforce's stock experienced a decline following their second-quarter earnings report, which exceeded expectations. However, guidance for sales in the upcoming October quarter fell short of projections. The company's earnings beat estimates but the stock fell as a result of the weaker sales outlook. This occurred amidst a push for AI agents within the company.

data.title: AAVE's price expected to hit $370-$400 by September 2025 as bulls aim to surpass $340 resistance with RSI at 46.88.
data.description: An analysis of the AAVE price suggests a possible surge to the range of $370 to $400 by September 2025. However, for this upward movement to occur, it is crucial for the price to surpass the significant resistance level at $340. Presently, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 46.88.

data.title: Amputee Jian used BrainCo Bionic Hand to play piano with a robot at AI gala on July 26, 2025, showcasing a remarkable performance.
data.description: In Boston on September 6, 2025, a noteworthy event took place where Jian showcased his talent alongside a humanoid robot on July 26. They mesmerized the audience with a rendition of Jasmine Flower at a grand AI gala. Jian's BrainCo Intelligent Bionic Hand showcased its capabilities under the bright lights, "blossoming" with each note played. This performance highlighted the advanced technology integrated into the bionic hand, leaving a lasting impression on the crowd.
